classification_rationale: Attacker manipulates the Keep3r TWAP oracle that Inverse Finance uses to value INV collateral. The oracle-coupling between the Keep3r TWAP and the Anchor lending invariant is the mechanism exploited: by purchasing INV across SushiSwap and Curve with 500 ETH of own funds over multiple blocks, the attacker moves the TWAP to a value 5x fair market, then borrows 1588 ETH + 94 WBTC + 3.9M DOLA against inflated collateral. No flash loan was used; the vulnerability is in the oracle-coupling mechanism itself.
